data.current_description: Gets long url. Either shortUrl parameter or hash is required.
data.summary_suggestion: Expand short URL to retrieve original long URL
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the original long URL from a shortened URL. Requires either the shortUrl parameter or hash parameter to identify the shortened link. Returns the LongURL object containing the expanded URL and associated metadata.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is incomplete - doesn't explain what the operation returns or clarify the relationship between shortUrl and hash parameters. Added summary to clarify the expand operation's purpose, expanded description to include return value and parameter relationship for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'searchInventory' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is acceptable but description is vague about what 'appropriate options' are and what is returned. Enhanced description to specify that it returns InventoryItem objects and clarifies the filtering capability for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for available inventory in the system
data.description_suggestion: Searches the inventory system for available items based on provided filter options. Accepts parameters to filter by item properties. Returns a list of InventoryItem objects matching the search criteria.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is vague about what 'appropriate options' are and what is returned. Enhanced description to specify that it returns InventoryItem objects and clarifies the filtering capability for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'addInventory' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks critical details. Missing: admin-only access requirement, what input schema is expected, what is returned, and side effects (item availability). Enhanced description to include security context, input/output schemas, and state changes for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Adds an item to the system
data.description_suggestion: Adds a new inventory item to the system. Requires admin privileges. Accepts an InventoryItem object with item details. Returns the created InventoryItem object with assigned identifier and timestamp. The item becomes immediately available in inventory searches.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks critical details. Missing: admin-only access requirement, what input schema is expected, what is returned, and side effects (item availability).
